free_text: The use of CFRMF integral data in cross section
~95% of neutrons are between 4 keV and 4 MeV. Median
energy is 370 keV and mean energy is 760 keV.
The CFRMF spectrum is available from the IRDF-2002
No information on source of uncertainties.
